sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113836" key="xerso/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χερσό-βῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113836.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living on dry land,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λιμνόβιος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:36:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
